data.title: The Kingdom of Bhutan moves $60M in BTC to an exchange
data.description:
The Royal Government of Bhutan moved $60M in BTC, retaining $1. 26B in total holdings. The country has the sixth largest treasury following the BTC reserves of North Korea.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/the-kingdom-of-bhutan-moves-60m-in-btc-to-an-exchange/

data.title: Bitcoin Surpasses 117,000 USDT with Daily Increase
data.description: According to Foresight News, Bitcoin has risen above 117,000 USDT, currently trading at 117,019.34 USDT. This marks a daily increase of 1.75%.

data.title: Bitcoin(BTC) Surpasses 117,000 USDT with a 1.54% Increase in 24 Hours
data.description: On Aug 07, 2025, 19:44 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Bitcoin has crossed the 117,000 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 117,046.742188 USDT, with a narrowed 1.54% increase in 24 hours.

data.title: Cardano Consolidates Ahead of Potential Breakout: Here are the Critical Price Levels You Need to Watch on ADA
data.description:
Cardano is currently consolidating its price movements as it approaches a crucial moment that could lead to a significant breakout. In this context, it is essential to pay close attention to the key price levels that could influence the future trajectory of ADA, the native cryptocurrency of the Cardano platform. Here are the critical price thresholds you should monitor closely to better understand the market's direction and potential opportunities for investment in ADA.
source: https://blocknews.com/cardano-consolidates-ahead-of-potential-breakout-here-are-the-critical-price-levels-you-need-to-watch-on-ada/
